welcome.preview: Hi {name}! Thanks for reaching out to us. We've received your enquiry — one of our stylists will get back to you within 30 minutes. Reply STOP to opt out.

appointment_reminder.preview: Reminder: your {service} appointment is tomorrow at {time}. Reply YES to confirm or RESCHEDULE to change.

re_engagement.preview: Hi {name}! It's been a while since your last visit. Book your next session in the next 7 days and get 10% off — just reply BOOK.

consent_request.preview: Please review and sign your service consent form: {link}
